plugins.name: agent-webbridge
plugins.description: Clean-room, open-source (MIT) browser automation for AI agents. Drives the user's real Chrome with its live login sessions across multiple Chrome profiles in parallel, attaching chrome.debugger per tab so N tabs in one profile run concurrently (not headless like Playwright/Firecrawl). A lightweight Node daemon plus an MV3 Chrome extension — no closed-source dependency, no account, no telemetry.
